name: Evidence Before Action
behavior: Inspect task instructions, repo guidance, and the smallest relevant source set before choosing an implementation.
runtime_rule: Run context routing before edits and record selected versus skipped context for risky work.
eval_check: Agent names the context it read and avoids irrelevant broad scans.
risk: Can become slow if used as permission to over-read.

name: Ledger As Working Memory
behavior: Keep durable task state for requirements, validation, changed scope, risks, and next action.
runtime_rule: Use as background for durable state; PAT-010 is the runtime rule for deciding when a file ledger is justified.
eval_check: Every requirement has status and evidence; unresolved risks are explicit.
risk: A default ledger reflex creates bureaucracy and duplicates PAT-010.

name: One Implementer, Independent Review
behavior: Use one write-capable implementer and separate read-only review for complex changes.
runtime_rule: Keep writes single-owner and use read-only review for requirements, safety, and validation gaps.
eval_check: No parallel writers touch overlapping files; review identifies real risks before completion.
risk: Extra review is wasteful for tiny edits.

name: Handoff Packs Beat Vague Plans
behavior: A useful handoff names objective, owned scope, context, constraints, validation, rollback, and stop conditions.
runtime_rule: Create implementation packs for delegated or multi-step work instead of vague task summaries.
eval_check: A fresh agent can execute the slice without hidden context.
risk: Over-detailed packs can duplicate source files or become stale.

name: Final Guard Blocks Incomplete Work
behavior: Before final answer, check requirements, changed files, validation evidence, unresolved risks, and next action.
runtime_rule: Run finalguard-review after changed work; the Stop hook reinforces ledger and validation discipline.
eval_check: Final answer reports validation and residual risk, or blocks on missing evidence.
risk: Guard must avoid false blocking in non-Git or read-only sessions.

name: Debug Autopsy Prevents Repeat Failures
behavior: Turn failures into root cause, fix, regression check, and prevention pattern.
runtime_rule: Use debug-autopsy for failed tests, broken hooks, regressions, or recurring mistakes before finalguard-review.
eval_check: Failure report includes expected versus actual behavior and regression check.
risk: Autopsy without reproduction can become storytelling.

name: Eval Every Workflow Claim
behavior: Measure behavior improvements with before/after scorecards instead of trusting style improvements.
runtime_rule: Use as an adoption gate for new behavior rules, not as a runtime workflow step.
eval_check: A before/after run improves score without regressing safety or validation.
risk: Scorecards can be gamed if no real before/after run exists.

name: Source Boundary Before Pattern Mining
behavior: Classify each source by public status, license/provenance, inspected surface, and excluded content before extracting patterns.
runtime_rule: Trace research must record what was inspected and what was deliberately excluded before accepting a pattern.
eval_check: Source notes include URL, date, type, license/provenance, inspected surfaces, exclusions, and confidence.
risk: Without this boundary, research can drift into copying dataset content.

name: Structural Samples Only
behavior: Use dataset schema, counts, tags, and file lists as evidence; do not store individual rows or message text.
runtime_rule: Prefer metadata and schema-level observations over row-level examples when mining trace datasets.
eval_check: Research output explains schema-level evidence and contains no raw trace rows.
risk: Dataset viewers may display sensitive or copyrighted message text by default.

name: Proportional Ledger Discipline
behavior: Use ledgers for large, delegated, high-risk, or multi-session work; use inline checklists for small work.
runtime_rule: Route large or risky work to requirements-ledger; avoid file-ledger ceremony for trivial tasks.
eval_check: The agent chooses file ledger, inline checklist, or no ledger based on risk and explains why.
risk: Overuse creates ritual compliance; underuse loses requirements.

name: Acceptance Gates Before Builders
behavior: Define acceptance gates and owned scope before implementation, then verify the diff against intent rather than trusting claims.
runtime_rule: Planning and implementation packs should include acceptance gates before editing starts.
eval_check: A plan includes acceptance gates and final review checks diff intent, not only passing tests.
risk: Visible gates can be gamed if final review does not inspect intent.

name: Scout Then Decompose Research
behavior: For broad research, first map terminology and fault lines, then design source-specific lanes instead of using fixed categories.
runtime_rule: Use only for broad research tasks; do not require scout/decompose ceremony for ordinary runtime work.
eval_check: Research notes distinguish datasets, project READMEs, tools, and protocol templates before synthesis.
risk: Too much scouting delays simple source checks and overstates evidence.

name: Capability Manifest Before Tool Use
behavior: Check available tools, permissions, and safe fallbacks before relying on a tool path.
runtime_rule: Context routing should mention preferred tool, fallback, and what to do if the tool is unavailable.
eval_check: Agent reports unavailable CodeGraph or Serena and uses a bounded fallback without blocking unnecessarily.
risk: Tool checking can become noise if the task is simple.

name: Decision Pack For External Review
behavior: When asking for high-cost or external judgment, send a compact review packet with selected files, goal, budget, and safety filters.
runtime_rule: Use only for explicit handoff, delegation, or external review; never as a default context-packing step.
eval_check: A handoff packet lists included context, omitted context, limits, and expected review question.
risk: External review can leak sensitive context or be mistaken for authority if local verification is skipped.

name: Read-Only Audit Produces Executable Plans
behavior: Separate audit/advice from code mutation; the research or audit step writes ranked findings and executable plans without editing production code.
runtime_rule: Keep as a research/review mode that produces plans; do not require it before ordinary implementation.
eval_check: Research output can be reviewed independently and does not mutate unrelated files.
risk: Too much separation slows small fixes and can produce stale plans.

name: Model-Independent Behavior Extraction
behavior: Extract behaviors that improve Codex outcomes regardless of model personality or vendor style.
runtime_rule: Reject patterns that optimize tone, imitation, or personality instead of planning, context, validation, review, or recovery.
eval_check: Each accepted pattern maps to one measurable Codex behavior improvement.
risk: Some useful style cues may be ignored; this is acceptable for safety.

name: Guard Hooks Fence Skipped Rules
behavior: Hooks should enforce only small, auditable rules that are commonly skipped under pressure.
runtime_rule: Add hook rules only for deterministic safety or completion checks; keep judgment in skills and review.
eval_check: Hook tests prove normal safe commands pass and risky or incomplete states block conservatively.
risk: Over-broad hooks can block legitimate work or train bypass behavior.

name: Aggregate-Only Dataset Mining
behavior: Process trace rows only in memory to compute schema, count, length, and category statistics; persist only aggregate evidence and exclusions.
runtime_rule: Trace research must prefer aggregate scanners and never write row payloads; conclusions from metadata or aggregates must state confidence.
eval_check: Research report lists files or rows scanned, aggregate metrics, excluded payload classes, confidence, and contains no raw row text.
risk: A careless scanner could leak values if output is not constrained to aggregates.

name: Truncation-Aware Context Claims
behavior: Treat context-truncated traces and capped context fields as uncertainty, not as complete evidence about the original task.
runtime_rule: Context routing and final review should name truncation or capped-context uncertainty before drawing behavior conclusions.
eval_check: Agent reports truncation/capped-context risk and avoids claiming full task intent from incomplete traces.
risk: Can become over-cautious if used when full source context is available.

name: Tool-Loop Density Drives Eval Focus
behavior: Tool-heavy trace sources should drive evals for tool discipline, context routing, validation, and recovery instead of style imitation.
runtime_rule: When traces are dominated by tool calls/results, evaluate safer tool selection, fallback, validation, and final review behavior.
eval_check: Before/after tasks include wrong-tool, missing-validation, and recovery cases, not only prose quality.
risk: Tool-density metrics do not prove quality; they only justify which behaviors to evaluate.

name: Recovery Signals Are Aggregate Evidence
behavior: Error, retry, fallback, and rate-limit fields support recovery workflows when handled as aggregate signals.
evidence_type: aggregate dataset scan and protocol comparison
runtime_rule: Debug autopsy should record failed tool path, retry boundary, fallback used, and regression check when tooling fails.
eval_check: Failure eval includes an unavailable or rate-limited tool and checks that Codex switches to a bounded fallback.
risk: Aggregate recovery fields do not reveal whether the original recovery was correct.

name: Confidence Gating For Runtime Rules
behavior: Promote only high-confidence, measurable behavior improvements into runtime skills or hooks; keep weaker claims in docs/evals until verified.
runtime_rule: Trace Miner and trace-researcher must state confidence and avoid runtime changes for patterns supported only by metadata or unrun evals.
eval_check: A new pattern marked medium or low confidence is docs/eval-only unless a validation run justifies promotion.
risk: Overly strict promotion can slow useful improvements, but prevents unsupported behavior changes.
